body:value: The data refers to information on Vigilance/ Monitoring Committee Constituted at District Level. It provides details such as District Vigilance/ Monitoring Committee Constituted or not, No. of meetings held, PIU Provided Training to Assistant Engineer & Jr. Engineer, Contractors and Workmen Engaged in Rural Roads for the selected sample states. The outcome is based on the sample survey undertaken by Programme Evaluation Organisation (PEO), Planning commission which covered 14 districts, 27 blocks, 138 roads, 138 habitations and 1380 beneficiary households spread over 7 states of India for 'Evaluation Study on Rural Roads component of Bharat Nirman, 2010'. The reference period for the study was 2005-06 to 2006-07.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Rural Roads
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Infrastructure
Roads
Urban
Rural
Development
title: Vigilance/Monitoring Committee Constituted at District Level - Based on Sample Survey

body:value: The data refers to state/UT wise Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents during. Data of road accidents in India are collected by Transport Research Wing (TRW) of Ministry of Road Transport & Highways from the Police Headquarters of the various states, UTs and Million Plus cities in India through specially designated nodal officers(DGP/ADGP(Crime)/ADGP(Traffic)/ Director (State Crime Record Bureau) in a 19-item format devised under Asia Pacific Road Accidents Data(APRAD)/ Indian Road Accident Data(IRAD) project of the United Nations Economic and Social Commission for the Asia & the Pacific(UNESCAP).
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Road Accidents
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
field_sector:name: Transport
Road Transport
title: State/UT wise Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents
